message:
fix(info): remove unused imports and fix fmtPath edge case

- Remove unused `fs` import from node:fs/promises
- Remove unused `loadConfig` import from ./config.js
- Fix fmtPath to use startsWith() instead of replace() to avoid
  incorrectly replacing HOME substring in middle of paths
